name: Arjun Sapkota
profileSummary: Arjun Sapkota is a Nepalese singer, composer, lyricist and model, known for his contribution towards Nepali folk music industry. As of March 2023 Sapkota has given voice to more than 30 Songs "Banki chari", "Baseu Alakkai", "Dukha Satamla", "Dui duna chaar", "pachheuri lisyo", "fulyo gurasha", "Nagara pir maya", "A thuli " including others are his few songs. Sapkota came to limelight after his 2019 Lok Dohori song "Banki chari banaima ramayo" with Devi Gharti Magar released on his own YouTube Channel.
